name: Filter: Scanline
description: Horizontal 'infinity lines' scanline vector effect from any photo
a11yLabel: Scanline rendering of the chosen image in brand tones

inputs.label: Image
inputs.help: Pick a photo or upload your own. It's processed on your device — the pixels never leave the browser.

inputs.label: Line height
inputs.help: Height of each scanline and the size of each cell, so smaller means thinner lines and finer detail.

inputs.label: Gap height
inputs.help: Size of the blank gap below each scanline, relative to the line. Larger = thinner lines with more space between them; 0 makes a solid image with no gaps. Doesn't change the detail or position of the image.

inputs.label: Separate pixels
inputs.help: Add a gap between cells too, so each one is a distinct square — an LED/pixel-matrix look instead of solid scanline bars.

inputs.label: Fill every line
inputs.help: Draw every line with no gaps — the same as setting the gap height to zero. Off = classic scanlines; on = a solid posterised image.

inputs.label: Background
inputs.help: Fills the blank lines and gaps. Leave empty for a transparent background (PNG/WebP/AVIF/SVG keep the transparency).
